data.name: Pawn Pleasure
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Pawnia

In Pawn Pleasure, you play as an owner of a pawn shop in Pawnia a world where only women exist. Your goal is simple: maximize profit and expand your business. But in this world, currency isn't the only thing that talks.

The "Art" of the Deal

Master the core gameplay loop of a shopkeeper. Browse items brought in by diverse customers, appraise their value, and haggle for the best price.

  • Buy Low, Sell High: Keep your margins wide to fund your shop's growth.

  • Negotiation: When a customer can't meet your price or when you want something more than gold, Negotiate with the customer. Engage in animated NSFW scenes for your negotiation.

Expand and Profit

  • Hire the Help: Build your team of female staff to help manage the daily shop operation.

  • Expand the Shop: Upgrade your shop, bring more expensive items, and hire more staff.

A World to Explore

Step outside the storefront to discover a city full of life and secrets. Visit various locations to find new opportunities and unique NPCs:

  • The Bank & Auction House: Manage your wealth and bid on rare item.

  • The Strange Hall: Seek out the mysterious Elf who resides there for unique encounters.

  • Home Sweet Home: Return home to rest and interact with your friend from the past.

Key Features

  • All-Female Cast: Every NPC, from the bank teller to the auctioneer, features unique personalities and adult scenes.

  • Dynamic NSFW Content: Animated NSFW scenes are integrated into the gameplay, rewarding your successful negotiation.

  • Pregnancy (Optional): Negotiate and Impregnate the lady.

Development Notes

This game is still in active development, here's what you can found in the game right now:

  • Core gameplay loop by selling and buying item from the shop.

  • 10+ unique customer and NPC.

  • Animated sexy scene (50%+ of current scene).

  • Auction house and bank with simple mechanic implemented.

  • Optional pregnancy (need to be unlocked first)

And here's the main development road map:

  • More and fully animated scene for all the girl in the game.

  • Deeper bargaining mechanic.

  • Branching dialogue at the shop.

  • More customer and NPC with their unique encounter.

  • Side activity like selling item to auction house, investing in bank and many more.

data.short_description: Step into a world populated entirely by women as the owner of your own shop. Buy low, sell high, and build your shop. When the price isn't enough, "negotiate" intimate deals to seal the trade. Expand your business, hire beautiful staff, and explore a city where every encounter leads to pleasure.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 荷蘭文, 印尼語, 俄文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: 10
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
